integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) to process the data.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in the spreadsheet application shows formulas (e.g., =SUM, =COUNTIF, =IF) when cells are selected, rather than manually typed static numbers.

integrity.description: The agent did not write a Python script to bypass manual spreadsheet interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like VS Code, nano) or terminal windows are shown running Python scripts with pandas/openpyxl to solve the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 500 titles (data rows). The correct calculated totals are: Total Items = 1,756; Total Checkouts = 21,460. The correct action classifications yield exactly 71 'Items to Weed' and 119 'Items to Order'. The 'Age' must be calculated relative to the year 2024.
